description: LiveAgent is a cloud‑based help desk software that offers ticketing, live chat, call center, knowledge base, and self‑serve portal features to help businesses manage customer support.
authentication: API key (X-API-Key header) for REST API; no OAuth support.
self_serve: Yes – includes knowledge base, FAQ, and self‑serve portal.
api_surface: REST API with endpoints for tickets, contacts, departments, agents, chats, etc. Supports JSON over HTTPS.
mcp: GDPR compliant; offers data residency options and privacy controls.
buildability: High – comprehensive REST API, SDK examples, and detailed documentation enable developers to build integrations quickly.
main_blocker: Lack of OAuth authentication; API key must be kept secret and is not rotated automatically.
